title: Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) Analyst Ratings and Forecasts
text: Current analyst expectations and consensus ratings for Robinhood Markets (HOOD). Analyst Consensus: 23 analysts covering Robinhood stock provide a consensus rating of Buy with an average price target of $105.87. This represents 35.26% upside from early May 2026 levels. Earnings Growth Forecasts: Robinhood is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 11.4% and 12.8% per annum respectively. EPS is expected to grow 10.6% per annum. Forecast annual earnings growth of 18.28% is expected to beat the US Capital Markets industry average of 14.8%. 2026-2028 Earnings Projections: 2026 earnings forecast: Average of $2.195 billion (range: $1.78B to $2.78B). 2027 earnings forecast: Average of $2.669 billion. 2028 earnings forecast: Average of $3.168 billion. Next Quarter Estimate: Q2 2026 EPS estimate of $0.40 with a range of $0.32 to $0.51. Rating Distribution: 14 Buy ratings, 3 Hold ratings, and 0 Sell ratings in the last 3 months. Recent Price Target: Argus adjusted target to $90 from $102 with Buy rating maintained. Price Performance: Median target of $110 implies significant recovery potential from depressed levels.
